1: from .config import Settings

5: class Engine:

8:

1: def transform(data, mode="default"):

arguments.title: mathlib architecture
arguments.content: Engine class in core.py orchestrates processing. Uses Settings from config.py for mode. transform() in utils.py does the actual data processing - fast mode takes first 100, default mode sorts.

arguments.summary: Explored mathlib codebase. Engine orchestrates processing, transform() handles data, Settings controls mode.
arguments.final_answer: Architecture: Engine (core.py) uses Settings (config.py) to configure processing. transform() in utils.py does actual work - fast mode takes first 100 items, default mode sorts. Test coverage in test_core.py.
